task: Revise an earlier claim about battery life after noticing a calculation error.
reasoning_trace: Error: load was 420 mA, not 320 mA.
Document correction and reason for revision.
answer: Updated battery life ≈ 9.5 hours due to higher load.
meta_lesson: Surface the source of the error when self-correcting numerical estimates.

task: Adjust a recommendation after discovering conflicting evidence.
reasoning_trace: New benchmark shows Algorithm B is 15% faster on target workload.
Re-evaluate constraints and note new evidence.
Update recommendation to Algorithm B with caveats.
answer: Recommend Algorithm B (faster on workload) with note about new benchmark.
meta_lesson: When confronted with new evidence, restate the change and cite the new source explicitly.
